bundles.title: Lock Observability Contract Deltas
bundles.goal: Define the additive autofix progress contract across existing specs before any runtime wiring begins.
outputs: spec delta for review_completed.payload.autofix and 2N+1 emission semantics
spec delta for run-scoped autofix progress snapshot and authority precedence
spec delta for autofix heartbeat/stale config keys with default fallback semantics
spec delta for slash-command background invocation and polling requirements

tasks.title: Add the additive autofix payload contract to review_completed without expanding the closed event catalog
Specify snapshot fields, run_id plus phase pathing, stale-heartbeat abandoned classification, and ledger-over-event-over-snapshot authority precedence
Define autofix heartbeat and stale-threshold config keys with invalid-to-default fallback semantics aligned to existing review config behavior
Document the canonical slash-command background plus polling pattern and terminal-only finalization rule

bundles.title: Wire Shared Schemas And Types
bundles.goal: Encode the new autofix event payload and progress snapshot contracts in shared runtime schemas and types.
inputs: spec delta for review_completed.payload.autofix and 2N+1 emission semantics
spec delta for run-scoped autofix progress snapshot and authority precedence
outputs: shared AutofixRoundPayload schema and type exports
shared autofix progress snapshot schema and type exports
runtime builders and validators for autofix event and snapshot payloads

tasks.title: Extend observation event contract types to support optional autofix payloads on review_completed
Add snapshot schema definitions for loop_state, terminal_outcome, counters, heartbeat_at, and ledger_round_id
Export shared validation and serialization helpers so CLI and runtime code consume one contract shape

bundles.title: Add Snapshot And Heartbeat Runtime Support
bundles.goal: Provide reusable runtime support for config-backed autofix progress snapshots keyed by run and phase.
inputs: shared autofix progress snapshot schema and type exports
outputs: readReviewConfig support for autofix heartbeat and stale-threshold keys
autofix progress snapshot writer keyed by run_id and phase
heartbeat refresh logic for non-terminal autofix loops

tasks.title: Extend readReviewConfig to expose autofix_heartbeat_seconds and autofix_stale_threshold_seconds with default values 30 and 120
Implement deterministic run-artifact-store path resolution for autofix-progress-<phase>.json under a run_id-scoped location
Build snapshot write and heartbeat refresh helpers that update non-terminal loop state without emitting extra events
Derive snapshot counters and ledger_round_id references from the review ledger while preserving ledger authority

bundles.title: Instrument Autofix Loop CLIs
bundles.goal: Make design and apply autofix loops emit round progress events and snapshot transitions at each boundary and on exit.
inputs: shared AutofixRoundPayload schema and type exports
autofix progress snapshot writer keyed by run_id and phase
outputs: design autofix loop emitting round-start, round-end, and terminal review_completed events
apply autofix loop emitting round-start, round-end, and terminal review_completed events
design/apply autofix loops writing snapshot updates at round boundaries and terminal exit

tasks.title: Wire round-start review_completed emissions with loop_state starting or in_progress for the design and apply autofix loops
Wire round-end review_completed emissions with awaiting_review or terminal loop states for both CLIs
Emit the single terminal review_completed event on loop exit and synchronize final snapshot writes
Preserve existing severity-aware gate, loop handoff semantics, LOOP_JSON output, and stderr diagnostics while integrating heartbeat lifecycle management

bundles.title: Update Slash Command Guides
bundles.goal: Document the canonical background plus polling autofix-loop behavior for chat surfaces and distribute the updated guides.
inputs: spec delta for slash-command background invocation and polling requirements
outputs: regenerated global command markdown for review_design and review_apply

tasks.title: Rewrite the review_design Auto-fix Loop section to require background launch, snapshot or event polling, and terminal-state finalization
Rewrite the review_apply Auto-fix Loop section to require background launch, snapshot or event polling, and terminal-state finalization
Document round rendering and the stale-heartbeat abandoned rule in the generated command guidance
Regenerate distributed command artifacts from the updated templates

bundles.title: Verify Contract And Runtime Behavior
bundles.goal: Prove the observability change is additive, end-to-end functional, and non-regressive for single-round review flows.
inputs: shared AutofixRoundPayload schema and type exports
design/apply autofix loop emitting round-start, round-end, and terminal review_completed events
regenerated global command markdown for review_design and review_apply
outputs: passing openspec validate and specflow-spec-verify runs
evidence for 2N+1 event emission, deterministic snapshot visibility, abandoned classification, and single-round autofix=null behavior

tasks.title: Run openspec validate and specflow-spec-verify to confirm spec and contract consistency
Update or regenerate snapshot tests for the slash-command template outputs
Exercise a multi-round autofix loop to verify 2N+1 review_completed events and a visible run-artifact snapshot at the deterministic phase path
Exercise process-kill and single-round review cases to confirm abandoned derivation and payload.autofix equals null for non-autofix reviews
